result.stdout:
Description:
  Hello, there!

Usage:
  FdbShell [options]

Options:
  -c, -C, --connfile <connfile>  The path of a file containing the connection string for the FoundationDB cluster.
  --connStr <connStr>            The connection string for the FoundationDB cluster.
  --api <api>                    The API version level that should be used.
  -p, --partition <partition>    The name of the database partition to open.
  -t, --timeout <timeout>        Default timeout (in seconds) for failed transactions. [default: 30]
  -r, --retries <retries>        Default max retry count for failed transactions. [default: 10]
  --aspire                       Connect to a local docker instance managed by .NET Aspire
  --docker <docker>              Connect to a local docker instance running on the given port
  --child <child>                Hash of the arguments of the parent process that spawned this instance
  --parent <parent>              PID of the parent process that spawned this instance
  --exec <exec>                  Execute this command, and exits immediately.
  --version                      Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
